name: OCL Iron and Steel Limited
summary: OCL Iron and Steel Limited manufactures and sells iron and steel products in India and internationally. The company offers sponge iron, steel billets, steel coils, and cold rolling and other steel auto components. It also generates power from waste heat recovery boilers and sells it to GRIDCO. The company was incorporated in 2006 and is based in Rajgangpur, India. OCL Iron and Steel Limited is a subsidiary of Garima Buildprop Private Limited.
